summary: Employee Portal bug fix VERIFIED. All features working correctly - Login, Dashboard with 5 tabs (Resumen, Empleados, Invitaciones, Documentos, Pedidos), Employee list showing 4 employees, Invitation creation API.

issues: 3 of 4 employees show 'Inactivo' badge even though backend shows is_active:true or status:active - could be misleading but not blocking

verified_features: POST /api/enterprise/auth/login - returns session_token, employee_id, name, email, role, permissions
GET /api/enterprise/employees - returns 4 employees with full details
POST /api/enterprise/invites - successfully creates new invitation with invite_code and registration URL
GET /api/enterprise/dashboard/stats - returns all KPI stats (total_employees:4, active_employees:4, total_clients:8, premium_clients:8, pending_sos:1)
Employee login page at /empleados/login loads correctly with email/password form
After login, redirect to /empleados/dashboard works correctly
Dashboard shows 5 tabs for admin users: Resumen, Empleados, Invitaciones, Documentos, Pedidos
Empleados tab displays list of 4 employees with avatars, names, emails, status badges, and roles
Invitaciones tab shows invitation creation form with all required fields
User info header shows 'CEO ManoProtect' and 'Super_admin' role correctly

backend.login_api: PASSED - returns session_token and user details
backend.create_invite_api: PASSED - creates invitation successfully with invite_code
backend.dashboard_stats_api: PASSED - returns all required KPI fields

frontend.login_page_loads: PASSED - form elements found and functional
frontend.dashboard_tabs_visible: PASSED - all 5 tabs present (Resumen, Empleados, Invitaciones, Documentos, Pedidos)
frontend.empleados_tab_content: PASSED - shows '4 empleados registrados' with employee list
frontend.user_header_info: PASSED - CEO ManoProtect and Super_admin displayed

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend API endpoints correctly use /api/enterprise/ prefix as fixed
isDirector check includes all admin roles: director, superadmin, super_admin, admin, ceo
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Portal bug is FIXED. Login at /empleados/login -> Dashboard at /empleados/dashboard works correctly. 5 tabs visible for admin users. Empleados tab shows 4 employees. Backend APIs all working with X-Session-Token header authentication.
notes: Minor UI discrepancy: Some employee cards show 'Inactivo' badge while they are actually active in backend. This is not blocking functionality.
